message:
test: PID-scoped temp file paths, label+limit SQL push-down, and sync safety updates

e2e_list_comprehensive.rs:
- New test e2e_list_limit_with_label_filter verifying that --label
  combined with --limit returns correctly filtered and limited results
  when labels are pushed down to SQL (matching the list.rs change that
  removed labels from client-side filtering).

e2e_sync_failure_injection.rs:
- Add export_temp_path_for_test() helper that constructs PID-scoped
  temp file paths (`*.jsonl.<pid>.tmp`) matching the new production
  naming convention.
- Update 4 tests (export_failure_temp_file_preserves_original,
  export_cleans_up_temp_file_on_success, atomic_write_pipeline_
  produces_valid_output, stale_temp_file_handled_gracefully) to
  use the PID-scoped temp path instead of the old fixed
  `issues.jsonl.tmp` name.

e2e_sync_git_safety.rs:
- Extend is_allowed_sync_file() to recognize PID-scoped temp files
  using the same validation logic as the production path validator,
  preventing false test failures when the export pipeline creates
  `*.jsonl.<pid>.tmp` files.

storage_export_atomic.rs:
- Add export_temp_path_for_test() helper (same pattern as above).
- Update 2 tests (temp_file_cleaned_up_on_failure,
  export_rejects_existing_temp_symlink_and_preserves_live_jsonl)
  to use PID-scoped temp paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
